_: Manifest for Gemini Nano Banana asset generation. Each entry produces one PNG saved to public/assets/scenes/<category>/<id>.png. The styleAnchor is appended to every prompt for consistency.
styleAnchor: Flat vector illustration in the style of Martin Paseka and the @road__classics Instagram artwork: monochromatic deep-burgundy and wine-red palette (#450521 primary, #2c0814 darks, #5a1530 mids, #c44470 highlights), warm cream accents (#e4cb9d, #f0d4a0) for skin and props, charming cozy character vignettes, rounded soft shapes, 3/4 isometric perspective, no text, no logos, subtle dotted grid background texture, dark almost-black setting, dreamlike Moravian wine country mood at dusk. Cinematic composition, balanced negative space.
negativePrompt: no photorealism, no 3D rendering, no harsh shadows, no realistic skin tones, no green grass (use dark wine ground), no blue sky (use burgundy night sky), no text, no watermark, no logos.

assets.prompt: Aerial 3/4 view of Valtice town square (náměstí Svobody) at early morning, baroque chateau silhouette with vineyards stretching away in regular rows, single warm street lamp glowing, two cyclists in racing kits walking with bikes, cobblestone surface, atmospheric mist rolling between rows of grapevines

Top-down 3/4 view of vineyard rows running diagonally across the frame with wooden T-stakes topped in cream, a winding cycling road weaving between fields, cypress trees lining the road, distant Lednice château silhouette on horizon

Aerial 3/4 view of a small Moravian wine-country town nestled on a green hillside, terraced vineyard rows descending below, tile-roofed houses with cream walls, a cycling road switchbacking down toward the village in late afternoon golden light, soft atmospheric mood

Steep cycling climb up Děvín hill in Pálava limestone ridge, narrow road winding up between dramatic white limestone cliffs, lonely solo cyclist in red jersey leaning into the climb, vineyards far below
Long flat causeway road across Novomlýnské reservoirs, water reflecting sky on both sides, peloton of 5 cyclists riding in a tight line with reflections, gentle wind on the water
Technical climb through Tesarova past pass, rocky outcrops, dense forest, cycling road snaking up between trees, cyclist visible mid-climb

The Reistna colonnade monument atop the final climb at sunset, classical white columns silhouetted against burgundy sky, finish-line tape stretched between trees, cyclist arms-raised in victory just below the columns, vineyards visible far below

Decorative top-down illustrated map of the Pálava region, rolling vineyard hills, Valtice and Mikulov labeled locations as little buildings, Děvín as a stylized peak, Reistna colonnade icon, dotted route path tracing the cycling course, compass rose, Moravian folk-art ornamental border

Cozy Moravian morning kitchen seen 3/4 from above, wooden table with three breakfast options laid out: scrambled eggs with bread, oatmeal porridge with fruit, and a buttery croissant with espresso. A cycling jersey draped over a chair, sun streaming through curtains, ceramic Moravian-pattern plates. Inviting and warm.

Home garage workshop seen 3/4, road bicycle on a maintenance stand, tire pump, chain lube, tools on a workbench, helmet hanging, soft morning light coming through the open garage door, dog mascot watching from the corner

Top-down view of a flat-laid red cycling jersey with three back pockets clearly visible, beside it laid out: an Enervit Carbo Gel C2:1PRO sachet, an Enervit Carbo Bar C2:1PRO, an Enervit Isocarb C2:1PRO drink mix sachet, energy chews. Player must drag items into pockets. Clean composition, soft drop shadows.

Top-down map of southern Moravia at dawn with a winding country road from a starting point heading to Valtice, a small car icon with bicycles on the roof rack moving along the route, vineyard patches visible, illustrated mile markers

Pre-race briefing scene at Valtice town square, hundreds of cyclists in colorful jerseys gathered behind a start banner reading nothing (no text), Road Classics flags fluttering, a dog mascot weaving among cyclists, baroque church in background, sunrise breaking

Side view sprite of a focused road cyclist in a red Enervit jersey leaning into the bars in racing tuck position, aero helmet, sunglasses, white cycling shoes, transparent background, character design, no text

Top-down view of a single road cyclist as seen from directly above — red Enervit jersey with cream stripe, aero helmet (oval seen from top), two thin foreshortened wheel ovals, arms reaching forward to drop bars. Compact sprite-icon composition, slight 3/4 angle suggesting forward motion
assets.style: Clean character sprite illustration, single isolated subject ONLY, plain transparent or pure off-white background. No road, no scenery, no landscape, no other riders, no buildings, no shadow on ground (subject only). The cyclist must be the entire focus, centered.

assets.prompt: A cyclist crouched on the roadside with a flat front tire, holding a CO2 cartridge, spare inner tube on the ground, frustrated expression, vineyards behind
Action shot of a cyclist mid-ride reaching out with their right hand to grab an Enervit gel from a feed-station volunteer, both blurring slightly with motion, illustrated style
A peloton breaking apart on a steep climb, one cyclist in red jersey out of the saddle attacking off the front, others straining behind, dramatic perspective
Local fans cheering on a roadside, an old man in a fedora raising a glass of wine, a child waving a Road Classics flag, dog mascot with bandana, vineyards behind
Cyclist crossing a finish-line tape at the Reistna colonnade at sunset, arms raised, peloton coming up behind, cream finish-line ribbon stretched across, columns of the colonnade framing the shot

Joyful post-race celebration scene at the top of a classical white colonnade at sunset. A group of cyclists raising their arms in triumph, holding water bottles. A pale beige labrador with a vine-leaf garland sits among them. Sunset glow behind the columns. Festive triumphant mood, illustrated character vignette.
A simple flat illustrated map pin in Enervit red with a small white tent symbol inside, no text, transparent background
A flat illustrated decision-point map marker, cream circle with a wine-red question mark, transparent background
Decorative Road Classics R-monogram badge in deep wine red on cream background, ornamental round border, no text other than the R, transparent background
Achievement badge in cream and wine: a stylized lightning bolt over a cyclist silhouette, ornamental ribbon, no text, transparent background
Achievement badge in cream and wine: a stopwatch over a steady-pace cyclist silhouette, ornamental ribbon, no text, transparent background
Achievement badge in cream and wine: an Enervit gel sachet icon centered, ornamental ribbon, no text, transparent background
Achievement badge in cream and wine: a chess knight piece with a cyclist motif, ornamental ribbon, no text, transparent background

A single plate of Moravian-style scrambled eggs (praženica) with two slices of dark rye bread, sprig of chives, pat of butter, small cup of black coffee on the side. Single hero subject seen 3/4 from above, isolated on a clean cream background

assets.prompt: Cozy underground Moravian wine cellar at night seen 3/4 from a low angle — vaulted brick ceiling, rows of oak barrels along the walls, candles on a long wooden table, three or four cyclists in casual evening wear gathered around the table with glasses of wine, dog mascot resting under the table

Cyclists dancing under string lights in a courtyard at dusk — a small folk band on a tiny stage, accordion and guitar, vineyards and cottage silhouettes in the distance, warm amber lantern glow, joyful relaxed mood

Close-up tabletop scene from above — five hands raising glasses of red wine in a toast, the glasses converging in the center of the frame, warm candlelight, rustic wooden table, a Road Classics cap and a bidon on the side

End-of-day scene — a single cyclist sitting on a stone bench at the Reistna kolonáda overlook at midnight, a glass of wine in hand, looking out over the dark Moravian vineyards under a starry sky with the Milky Way faintly visible. The colonnade columns rising softly behind. Quiet, contemplative

Aerial 3/4 view of the Žďárské vrchy highlands — densely forested rolling hills, a winding cycling road threading between the spruce trees, distant rocky outcrop of Devět skal on the horizon, summer dusk light. Empty road, no cyclists in this frame

Iconic silhouette of the Ještěd peak with its distinctive hyperboloid transmitter tower against a dramatic burgundy evening sky, Jizerské hory ridges receding behind, a thin cycling road switchbacking up the mountainside on the left. Empty road, no cyclists in this frame
